name: Spaghetti with Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all meatball ingredients thoroughly. Shape into 24 meatballs about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
2. Bake meatballs on a baking sheet in a preheated oven at 450°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until browned. Alternatively, fry the meatballs in a skillet and drain excess oil.
3. Combine all spaghetti ingredients (except meatballs, pasta, and cheese) in a slow cooker. Stir well.
4. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 10 hours.
5. Add the cooked meatballs and continue cooking for an additional 2 hours.
6. Just before serving, cook the spaghetti according to package directions.
7. Serve topped with meatballs in sauce and pass extra grated Parmesan cheese.
